slack.title: Slack
slack.description: Search messages, read channels, and post summaries — the delivery surface for watchers, check-ins, and status updates.

gmail.title: Gmail
gmail.description: Search and read email threads for stakeholder context, briefing packs, and follow-ups.

google-drive.title: Google Drive
google-drive.description: Search, read, and fetch documents, decks, and spreadsheets from Google Drive.

google-calendar.title: Google Calendar
google-calendar.description: Read upcoming meetings, steering cadence, and review cycles from Google Calendar.

atlassian.title: Atlassian
atlassian.description: Read Jira issues, plans, Confluence pages, decisions, RAID logs and delivery artefacts scoped to the user's permissions.

linear.title: Linear
linear.description: Search, read, and update Linear issues, projects, initiatives, and milestones scoped to the user's permissions.

asana.title: Asana
asana.description: Search, read, and update Asana tasks, projects, portfolios, and goals scoped to the user's permissions.
